anchor: STUDIO STYLE — keep this IDENTICAL across every product in this set so the whole catalogue clearly comes from ONE studio shoot: a seamless warm off-white / soft cream studio backdrop, bright high-key and airy, soft diffused daylight falling gently from the upper left, a soft natural contact shadow under the product, calm minimal-classic premium mood, warm-neutral colour grade, no harsh shadows, no coloured light. The product is the clear hero, sharp and well-lit, with clean negative space.

shots.name: BG001
shots.scene: Product: a plain BLANK natural-cream cotton canvas tote bag with cream handles (keep it blank, no print). Standing upright at a gentle 3/4 angle on the seamless studio backdrop, full so it holds a clean rectangular shape, soft contact shadow. Clean catalogue hero, no props.

shots.name: DW001
shots.scene: Product: a matte-orange stainless-steel water bottle with a slim silicone carry-loop on its cap (keep the orange colour and loop faithful). Standing upright photographed straight-on on a pale natural-wood ledge, a single softly-blurred dried eucalyptus sprig far in the background.

shots.name: ST001
shots.scene: Product: a slim matte blush-pink click pen. Lying diagonally on a tidy light-wood desk beside a closed cream notebook and a tiny sprig of greenery, soft daylight from the left, shallow depth of field. Remove the old picture frame and all handwritten/script text from the input.

shots.name: FN001
shots.scene: Product: a small pastel-pink handheld portable fan with a grey wrist strap. Standing upright at a slight angle on the plain studio surface, clean and bright, a faint feeling of summer freshness but very minimal. Remove the size-measurement numbers and guide lines from the input.

shots.name: UM001
shots.scene: Product: a black automatic folding umbrella shown OPEN from a 3/4 angle, the canopy catching soft studio light to reveal its matte fabric texture, resting cleanly on the warm off-white backdrop with a soft shadow beneath. Premium and minimal.

shots.name: GS001
shots.scene: Product: a premium business gift set — a sage/teal leather notebook with a magnetic strap and a gold-trim black pen seated in its open black presentation box (this box IS the product, keep it). Shown from a slight top-down angle on the warm studio backdrop, soft daylight, elegant and tidy.

shots.name: LS001
shots.scene: Product: a slim sage-blue leather card holder with a single card peeking from the wave-cut slot. Resting leaning at a gentle angle against a small neutral stone block on the studio backdrop, soft daylight, shallow depth of field. Remove the hand and the cash note — keep just the clean card holder.

shots.name: BG002
shots.scene: Product: a wide natural-cream canvas tote printed on the front with an EXISTING green house-shaped 'บ้านอุ่นใจ EST. 2000' logo — keep that printed design EXACTLY as in the input, do not alter the Thai text or logo. Hanging from a minimal light-wood wall peg on a clean off-white wall, a small eucalyptus plant softly blurred at the lower right.

shots.name: DW002
shots.scene: Product: a petrol-navy insulated coffee tumbler with a ribbed silicone grip band around the middle and a flip lid with a stainless ring (keep the navy colour and ribbed band faithful). Standing upright on a light wooden café-style counter, a softly-blurred coffee cup far behind, warm morning light.

shots.name: LS002
shots.scene: Product: a slim black PU-leather card holder with multiple card slots. Lying at a slight angle on a warm neutral surface with a single card peeking out, soft daylight, shallow depth of field. Remove ALL Chinese text, the small inset photo and the mirror reflection from the input — clean minimal product shot.
